BOOK CONSULTATION NOW
CAREERS
Careers and Articling Opportunities at MGL Lawyers
At MGL Lawyers, we value giving articling students hands-on practical experience to set them up for success in their legal careers. Our articling program is directly supervised by our lawyers and you will have exposure to the entire team and various legal matters.
Why Article at MGL Lawyers?

As an articling student, you will be exposed to a wide range of immigration matters. There will also be opportunities to gain exposure in business law and in litigation matters. You will work with our team of lawyers in drafting, preparing immigration applications, legal opinions, attending meetings with our lawyers, and contributing to strategy.  

Our senior lawyers are dedicated to providing mentorship, guidance and support, helping you develop skills and confidence throughout your articling term.

Our collaborative approach and inclusive environment are at the heart of everything we do. You’ll work closely with lawyers and our team throughout your articling term.

We offer opportunities for training, development and networking, including workshops, seminars and legal community events.

Who are we looking for?

The firm seeks graduates and students who are resourceful, have a go-getter attitude, and can work in a collaborative team environment. An interest and passion for immigration is considered an asset when applying to our team.
